perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with a ponytail, wearing a black zip-up jacket over a blue sports top, looks confidently at the camera and holds up one finger. (2) She appears wrapped in a cartoon-patterned blanket, looking visibly exhausted and sickly with dark circles under her eyes, holding up two fingers. (3) She is wearing a shiny white jacket, looking even more drained and pale, holding up three fingers in a weak 'OK' sign. (4) The scene cuts back to her in the original black jacket, looking refreshed and energized; she holds up one finger, smiles, and begins to unzip her jacket while lunging toward the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat Chinese pop song with a steady electronic beat plays. A young female voice says 'Jiè sè dì yī tiān' (Day 1 of abstinence) in a clear, healthy tone. (2) The music continues as the same female voice says 'Jiè sè dì èr tiān' (Day 2), sounding noticeably more fatigued and breathless. (3) The voice says 'Jiè sè dì sān tiān' (Day 3), sounding extremely weak, thin, and hoarse. (4) The music remains upbeat as the voice returns to an energetic and loud tone, saying 'Jiè sè dì yī tiān' (Day 1) again.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '戒色第一天' (Day 1 of abstinence) appears at the bottom center in white text. (2) '戒色第二天' (Day 2 of abstinence) appears in the same style. (3) '戒色第三天' (Day 3 of abstinence) appears. (4) '戒色第一天' (Day 1 of abstinence) reappears, serving as a humorous punchline indicating a reset.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Temporal progression of decline -> Humorous reset to starting state.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator appearing in all scenes.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair in a ponytail, wearing heavy makeup including red lipstick and false eyelashes.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor room with a plain wall, a doorway, and a fan visible in the background.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Standard indoor lighting, slightly brightened in post-processing.

vocal_qualities.tone: Varies from energetic to extremely weak and back to energetic.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a humorous skit parodying the concept of 'abstinence' (likely suggestive in context). It uses a fast-forward narrative to show the protagonist's exaggerated physical decline over three days of trying to abstain, only to hilariously fail and reset to 'Day 1' with renewed vigor, suggesting her inability to maintain the resolution.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Usage of the 'Abstinence' (戒色) challenge meme.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on the contrast between the character's appearance in the different 'days' to create a comedic effect.
